What Is Included

The complete system. Built for you.

01
The LinkedIn Content Engine
Your personal content machine. It creates everything you need to post, send, and sell on LinkedIn. You wake up, content is ready, outreach is handled.
Posts That Convert
Viral lead magnets that fill your funnel
Case studies that close deals
Personal posts that build trust
Value posts that position you as the expert
Outreach That Books Calls
50+ proven outreach messages built in
Messages for profile viewers
Messages for post engagers
Lead magnet delivery scripts
Every scenario covered
Never Run Out of Ideas
Ideas tailored to your exact ICP
Top of funnel (attract new eyes)
Middle of funnel (build trust)
Bottom of funnel (close deals)
Lead magnet ideas (what converts, what goes viral)
02
Lead Capture Funnel
Prospect sees your post. Clicks. Gets your lead magnet. Gives you their email. Gets nurtured automatically. Books a meeting. All without you doing anything.
What Pulls Them In
Newsletter posts that grow your list
Offer posts that drive action
Lead magnets they actually want
Case studies that remove doubt
What Converts Them
Welcome emails when they opt in
Awareness emails that educate
Nurturing emails that build trust
Authority emails that position you
Conversion emails that book the meeting
03
LinkedIn Explosion Group
Skip the slow part. Get access to our private client group with over 200,000+ combined followers. Instant engagement on your posts from day one. No waiting months for the algorithm to pick you up.

How It Works

The Allbound Funnel in six steps.

Content Engine creates and posts for you
Inbound. Automatically. On schedule. In your voice. Your brand grows while you sleep.
↓
Outreach goes out to warm and cold prospects
Outbound. Profile viewers, post engagers, and cold prospects get messaged daily.
↓
Lead capture funnel collects their email
Landing page delivers your lead magnet. Email captured automatically.
↓
Nurture sequence warms them up
Automated emails build trust, demonstrate value, and move them toward a call.
↓
Prospect books a meeting
Warm. Pre-sold. They already know your thinking before they speak to you.
↓
New client closed
Inbound and outbound working together. One system. 30+ meetings per month.

The 14-Day Build

From kickoff to fully installed.

Days 1-2
Kickoff + Deep Audit
Kickoff call. Deep audit of your LinkedIn, ICP, offer, voice, and competitors. Roadmap drafted and sent for approval.
Days 3-5
Engine Built + Calibrated
Engine built and calibrated. Prompt library created. First test outputs reviewed with you.
Days 6-8
Content Production
30 posts generated using the Engine. Lead magnet written. DM scripts produced.
Days 9-11
Funnel Build
Landing page copy built. Email sequence written. Email platform configured and live.
Days 12-13
Profile + SOP
LinkedIn profile optimised. Content bank populated. Full system SOP written.
Day 14
Handover
Handover call. You see the Engine in action. Everything transferred. You are live.

The Problem This Solves

Inbound alone is slow. Outbound alone is cold. You need both.

The inbound-only trap. You post content and wait. Some weeks it works. Most weeks it does not. You are at the mercy of the algorithm. Growth is slow and pipeline is unpredictable.

The outbound-only grind. You send cold messages all day. Most get ignored. The ones that reply are skeptical because they have never heard of you. No brand. No trust. Just another DM in their inbox.

The Allbound Funnel fixes both. Your content builds the brand. Your outreach fills the pipeline. Your funnel captures and nurtures every lead. They work together as one system. That is why it books 30+ meetings per month instead of 5.

💡

Why There Is No Guarantee

Guarantees attract buyers who will not do the work. The Allbound Funnel only produces results if you show up consistently. We do not want your money if you are not going to use the system. Every founder doing $20K+/month has made bigger bets on far less certain outcomes.

Who This Is For

Built for founders who want inbound and outbound working together.

This is for you if
Doing $20K+/month revenue from an active B2B service
Have a clear offer and know who you sell to
Want inbound and outbound running from one system
Ready to add 30+ meetings per month to your calendar
Want to hand it to your team or have us run it for you
This is not for you if
Under $20K/month revenue
You do not have a defined offer or ICP yet
You only want to do inbound or only outbound
You are not ready to commit to a real system

The Transformation

Where you are now vs. 60 days from now.

Most B2B founders are stuck doing inbound or outbound. Never both. The ones doing inbound wait months for traction. The ones doing outbound burn out sending cold messages to strangers who have never heard of them.

The Allbound Funnel combines both into one system. Within 60 days, your content builds the brand, your outreach fills the pipeline, and your funnel converts them into meetings. All running together.

Before the Allbound Funnel
Posting sporadically. Getting no traction.
Pipeline relies on referrals that dry up.
Content taking hours. Getting deprioritised when client work picks up.
Watching competitors build audiences while you stand still.
Every new lead starts cold with zero context about you.
After the Allbound Funnel
30 posts per month, consistent, in your voice. Eduardo went from zero inbound to $50K+ in 60 days.
Inbound DMs from warm prospects. Albano booked 40+ high-intent appointments in 30 days.
10 seconds to prompt the Engine. Content ready. Jack signed a $15K retainer in 14 days with Profit Path.
Your audience and authority compound weekly. Cem built 30,000+ followers and equity deal conversations.
Prospects arrive pre-sold. Tomer's lead magnets hit 2,500+ comments. Positive ROI from month one.

Stop choosing between inbound and outbound. Run both.
